title: azure-analyzer install configuration
description: Declarative allow/deny and package-manager override config for the azure-analyzer installer.

autoInstall.description: When true, missing tools are installed automatically (requires -InstallMissingModules).

tools.description: Per-tool overrides keyed by tool name (must match a name in tool-manifest.json).

enabled.description: When false, the tool is skipped at install and scan time (Status=Skipped).

manager.description: Override the default package manager. Must be in the security allow-list.
